widgets_values: Move the woman from the right - side white sofa to the left - side brown recliner. Strictly preserve her original facial features, hairstyle, gray dress, black tights, and the action of holding a cup. Keep the left - side room elements (carpet, small table with fruit, magazine, yellow wall, window) and lighting consistent. Ensure natural seating in the recliner, matching scale and angle. Do not alter any appearance details except the seating position. Generate via FLUX.1 Kontext.
Using this elegant style, create a portrait of a swan wearing a pearl tiara and lace collar, maintaining the same refined quality and soft color tones.

This woman is wearing a beige camisole dress and holding a green bag. Keep the dress's suspender design, lace - embellished bust, bow at the waist, and length exactly as in the reference image. The new dress should fit naturally on her body from the same shoulder and torso position. Preserve her face, hairstyle, posture, and the surrounding background.Keep the texture details and texture of the beige camisole skirt unchanged

this woman is standing next to a pink Porsche convertible. this background is a tranquil lakeside, a road with pink cherry blossom trees with petals scattered on the ground, and mountains in the distance under a blue sky.Keep the exterior details of the pink car unchanged.
